scenarios.title: readable-ui example
scenarios.taskDescription: 이 사이트에서 Users 관리 페이지로 이동하려면 어떤 링크를 눌러야 하지?

scenarios.title: Admin dashboard
scenarios.taskDescription: 최근 활동 4건 중 `rotateKey` 이벤트의 타깃 리소스를 알려줘.

scenarios.title: User management
scenarios.taskDescription: status 가 active 인 user 목록을 정렬 키 `createdAt:desc` 로 다음 페이지까지 보려면 어떤 호출을 해야 하지?

scenarios.title: User detail (Alice)
scenarios.taskDescription: 이 사용자 계정을 삭제하려면 어떤 버튼 흐름을 거치지? preview 단계 tool 이름도 알려줘.

scenarios.title: Reports
scenarios.taskDescription: Revenue by plan 표에서 MRR 이 가장 큰 plan 의 id 와 customers 수를 알려줘.

scenarios.title: Audit log
scenarios.taskDescription: actor=alice@example.com 필터 상태에서 최근 10건 중 `rotateKey` 액션의 건수는?

scenarios.title: Background jobs
scenarios.taskDescription: status=error 필터 결과가 비어 있다는 사실을 확인하고, 사용 가능한 전체 상태 팔레트 5개를 나열해줘.

## main

# readable-ui example

Same React tree · two renderings.

Each sample page is rendered twice from one component tree: a richly-designed HTML view for humans, and a clean Markdown view for agents. Open both side-by-side to see what AI sees vs. what a human sees.

## Dashboard

TOPBAR

Workspace overview — counts, recent activity, a single refresh action.

View HTML

View Markdown .md

## Users

SIDEBAR

Form-heavy CRUD — paginated table + create form, typed tool params.

View HTML

View Markdown .md

## Reports

TOPBAR

Stat / Progress / Descriptions directives — KPI, quota bars, metadata, and exportable tables.

View HTML

View Markdown .md

## Audit log

SIDEBAR

Immutable feed — filter + sort + paginated summary, view-only rows.

View HTML

View Markdown .md

## Background jobs

SIDEBAR

Background jobs — empty state and 5-stage status palette fixture.

View HTML

View Markdown .md

## User detail (Alice)

DETAIL

Single-resource view — breadcrumb, Descriptions profile/meta rail, destructive footer.

View HTML

View Markdown .md

Append .md to any route — same tree, different representation.

---
title: Admin dashboard
purpose: At-a-glance overview of the admin workspace — user counts, active
  sessions, recent activity.
role: admin
layout: topbar
nav:
  items:
    - label: Dashboard
      href: /dashboard
      active: true
    - label: Users
      href: /users
    - label: Roles
      href: /roles
    - label: Audit log
      href: /audit
    - label: Reports
      href: /reports
paths:
  view: /dashboard
  markdown: /dashboard.md
constraints:
  - id: counts-cached
    text: Counts are cached for 60 seconds. Use Refresh for the latest snapshot.
    severity: info
updatedAt: 2026-04-17T09:15:00Z
tools:
  - name: refreshDashboard
    title: Refresh dashboard
    description: Invalidate cache and fetch the latest counts and activity.
    role: admin
  - name: viewEvent
    title: View audit event
    description: Open an audit event by id.
    input:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
    role: admin
extensions:
  conventions:
    duplicate-button-link: dual-render
    form-inner-button-action: inherit
    uri-query-encoding: percent-decoded-match
    form-default-ssot: directive
    destructive-action: two-step-preview
---

---
title: User management
purpose: Admin page to list, create, update, and delete user accounts.
role: admin
layout: sidebar
nav:
  items:
    - label: Dashboard
      href: /dashboard
    - label: Users
      href: /users
      active: true
    - label: Roles
      href: /roles
    - label: Audit log
      href: /audit
    - label: Reports
      href: /reports
paths:
  view: /users
  markdown: /users.md
constraints:
  - id: delete-irreversible
    text: Deleting a user is permanent and cannot be undone.
    severity: danger
  - id: audit-log
    text: All mutations here are recorded in the audit log.
    severity: info
updatedAt: 2026-04-18T00:00:00Z
tools:
  - name: listUsers
    title: List users
    description: List users with pagination / sort / filter. Accepts `_page`,
      `_size`, `_sort=<key>:<dir>`, and `_filter_<field>=<value>` query params.
      Unspecified params fall back to each property's `default` value.
    input:
      type: object
      properties:
        _page:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
          default: 1
        _size:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
          default: 20
        _sort:
          type: string
          pattern: ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+:(asc|desc|ASC|DESC)$
          default: createdAt:desc
        _filter_status:
          type: string
          enum:
            - active
            - pending
            - archived
            - disabled
            - error
        _filter_role:
          type: string
          enum:
            - admin
            - user
    role: admin
  - name: createUser
    title: Create user
    description: Create a new user.
    input:
      type: object
      properties:
        name:
          type: string
          minLength: 1
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        role:
          type: string
          enum:
            - admin
            - user
      required:
        - name
        - email
        - role
    role: admin
  - name: updateUser
    title: Update user
    description: Update a user's role.
    input:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
        role:
          type: string
          enum:
            - admin
            - user
      required:
        - id
    role: admin
  - name: deleteUserPreview
    title: Preview delete user
    description: Return a confirmation page before permanently deleting a user.
    input:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
    role: admin
  - name: deleteUser
    title: Delete user
    description: Permanently delete a user by id.
    input:
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
      required:
        - id
    role: admin
extensions:
  conventions:
    duplicate-button-link: dual-render
    form-inner-button-action: inherit
    uri-query-encoding: percent-decoded-match
    form-default-ssot: directive
    destructive-action: two-step-preview

# Audit log

Immutable trail of privileged actions. The Markdown view shows the same feed without styling — ideal for agents that want to scan the data.

IMPORTANT

Audit entries cannot be edited once written. Retention is 400 days.

### SCOPE

- • All mutations from the admin console.
- • System-triggered rotations and backups.
- • Report exports and data downloads.
